race_name: Squadron Energy Grafton to Inverell Cycle Classic

top_categories.workout_context: 11,096ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
At mile 60 of 142, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Squadron Energy Grafton to Inverell Cycle Classic's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before March.
78ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Squadron Energy Grafton to Inverell Cycle Classic's sealed road — mountain highway through World forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 142 miles.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 142 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Squadron Energy Grafton to Inverell Cycle Classic. Train it until it feels boring.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 11,096ft of climbing on sealed road — mountain highway through World does to your power file on race day.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on sealed road — mountain highway through World. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
142 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
At Squadron Energy Grafton to Inverell Cycle Classic, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 142 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Squadron Energy Grafton to Inverell Cycle Classic’s 142 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Squadron Energy Grafton to Inverell Cycle Classic. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on VO2max, Durability, and Race Simulation to prepare you for 142 miles of sealed road — mountain highway through world heritage rainforest and new england highlands in Grafton to Inverell, New South Wales, Australia.
